Good Health and Well-being.reason: Focus on health fitness and personal fitness assessment supports Target 3.4 ('reduce premature mortality from non-communicable diseases').

Quality Education.reason: Course promotes health education and fitness planning, linking to Target 4.7 ('knowledge for sustainable development').

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course core is 'Health Fitness' (健康體適能), directly supporting Target 3.4 by teaching prevention of non-communicable diseases through physical activity like 'aerobic training'.

Quality Education.reason: Provides skills for 'personal exercise planning' (個人運動規劃), contributing to the 'sustainable lifestyles' aspect of Target 4.7.

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly 'co-ed' (男女合班), ensuring equal access and participation for all genders, aligning with the principles of non-discrimination (Target 5.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The 'co-ed' (男女合班) format promotes social inclusion of both sexes, a component of Target 10.2.
